name: Minecraft Realism
description: A Minecraft visual realism blueprint using performance mods, shader loaders, careful presets, and optional distant terrain.

apps.reason: Manages separate Minecraft instances for modded setups.
Lightweight mod loader for the recommended performance stack.
Reduces memory pressure in modded setups.
Adds far-distance terrain rendering on capable PCs.
Alternative mod and modpack management tool.

config_recommendations: Use separate instances for vanilla, shader, and heavy modded profiles.
Increase shader and Distant Horizons settings gradually.
Keep texture resolution aligned with available VRAM.
risk_warnings: Shaders and high-resolution textures can heavily reduce frame rate.
Distant Horizons can increase CPU, RAM, disk, and GPU load.
not_recommended: Path-traced shader presets on systems without a capable discrete GPU.
next_steps: Install mods manually from official or trusted mod sources.
Test one shader preset before adding texture packs or distant terrain.
